functional_requirements: FR001: User can create account using email and password.
FR002: User must verify email before first login.
missing_information: No password complexity requirements (e.g., uppercase, special characters).
No email verification mechanism details (e.g., how verification is sent, expiration).
No error handling or user feedback specifications.
No account creation flow details (e.g., confirmation page, duplicate email handling).
